mapper.select: SELECT c.chat_no AS "chatNo", c.room_no AS "roomNo", c.user_uuid AS "userUuid", c.message AS "message", c.sent_at AS "sentAt", u.user_name AS "userName", u.user_profile_image AS "userProfileImage" FROM chats c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_uuid = u.user_uuid WHERE c.room_no = #{roomNo} ORDER BY c.sent_at ASC

SELECT c.chat_no AS "chatNo", c.room_no AS "roomNo", c.user_uuid AS "userUuid", c.message AS "message", c.sent_at AS "sentAt", u.user_name AS "userName", u.user_profile_image AS "userProfileImage" FROM chats c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_uuid = u.user_uuid WHERE c.room_no = #{roomNo} ORDER BY c.sent_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
